data.title: Dell Technologies Stock Is Rallying Monday: What's Going On?
data.description: Dell Technologies Inc (NYSE:DELL) shares are getting a lift Monday morning following tech tariff exemptions from the Trump administration.

data.title: Synaptics Targets Foldable Boom with New S3930 Series Touch Controllers
data.description: Synaptics (SYNA) shares up premarket after unveiling S3930 touch controllers, designed for foldable OLED displays. Sampling now, mass production in July 2025. Partnerships for ATSC 3.0 and ULP SoCs also announced.

data.title: Trump's Tariffs Could Send Rents Higher, Economist Warns
data.description: Rents remained relatively stable last month. However, economists warned Trump's tariffs could put upward pressure on the rental market.

data.title: KKR Targets Backbone Of Global Trading With $3.1 Billion OSTTRA Acquisition
data.description: KKR shares up premarket on Monday as S&P Global and CME Group sell OSTTRA to KKR for $3.1 billion, allowing employees to share in future growth.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Tariff Uncertainty Turns Traders Cautious — But Oil, Silver Might Be The Escape Hatch, Says Market Analyst
data.description: Futures traders navigate minefield of new tariffs causing shockwaves in markets. Volatility creates opportunities in energy, metals and equities.
